instructions: Round 1 blind ballot. Read-only; do not edit. Read Runs/face-search-20260720-032234/round-1/primary-package.json, then use view_image original detail on its target and every front/three-quarter/profile path. Do not inspect recipes, manifests, scripts, parameters, directions, audit package, or any other run data. Compare the approved target directly with each front. Front likeness is reference-backed; three-quarter and profile are anatomy-regression checks only. Ignore lighting, skin, hair, eyebrows, texture, and presentation: they cannot improve rank. Judge skull/facial silhouette, feature placement/projection, age structure, asymmetry, anatomical continuity, grounded mature geometry, and individual character. Reject projection tricks, implausible anatomy, cartoon/toy geometry, missing evidence, and generic smoothing that removes character. Return only the evaluator-contract JSON ballot. No candidate IDs, parameter inference, prose, markdown, promotion language, or extra fields.
